ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was adopted */,
  "housing_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the housing period */,
  "housing_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the housing period */,
  "total_housing_target" INTEGER /* Total housing target for the period */,
  "annual_target" INTEGER /* Annual housing target */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_housing_period_start FOREIGN KEY ("housing_period_start") REFERENCES housing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_housing_period_end FOREIGN KEY ("housing_period_end") REFERENCES housing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the housing period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing target */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the target is associated with */,
  "total_housing_target" INTEGER /* Total housing target for the period */,
  "annual_target" INTEGER /* Annual housing target */,
  "yearly_progress" TEXT /* Yearly progress towards the target */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_targets_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_departments" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-department association */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the department in relation to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_departments_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_departments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
